---
title: "visualization drafts"
format: pdf
---

**Potential figure 1:**

**Potential figure 2:**

[delete this line and enter your figure here; if you don't have one, delete the entire section]

**Potential figure 3:**

[delete this line and enter your figure here; if you don't have one, delete the entire section]

**Potential figure 4**

[delete this line and enter your figure here; if you don't have one, delete the entire section]
